# APEX Houston 77084 URL catalog for BOSS routing

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

Primary geography: Houston area, ZIP 77084 example. ## Primary APEX pages - APEX Accelerators national site - https://www.apexaccelerators.us/ - national entry point, locator, APEX explanation, and Native American APEX map route.

## When to surface

Surface when the user's question concerns artificial intelligence, business planning, certification during Validation, Formation, Launch and this source is relevant to the next document or human handoff.

## Key information

- Primary geography: Houston area, ZIP 77084 example.
- ## Primary APEX pages
- APEX Accelerators national site - https://www.apexaccelerators.us/ - national entry point, locator, APEX explanation, and Native American APEX map route.
- SBA federal contracting assistance - https://www.sba.gov/local-assistance/federal-contracting-assistance - explains APEX Accelerators as a contracting technical-assistance resource.
- UH APEX homepage - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/default.asp - Houston-area APEX entry point.
- UH APEX services - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Services.asp - services, counties served, consulting, training, registrations, certifications, market research, solicitation assistance.
- UH APEX eligibility - https://www.uhapex.uh.edu/APEX/Program_Eligibility.asp - eligibility rules for formed, for-profit businesses in service area.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
